Method.Name: run
collectFromDMV
updateArchive
Method.Source: private void updateArchive() { DBMDBUsageArchiveView archiveView; DBMDBResourceUsageArchive archive; DBMDBResourceUsageArchive archiveCheck; insert_recordset archive(timeStamp, CPULimitAvg, CPUPercentAvg, CPUPercentMax, CPUPercentMin, dataIOPercentAvg, dataIOPercentMax, dataIOPercentMin, instanceCpuPercentAvg, instanceCpuPercentMax, instanceCpuPercentMin, instanceMemoryPercentAvg, instanceMemoryPercentMax, instanceMemoryPercentMin, logWritePercentAvg, logWritePercentMax, logWritePercentMin, maxSessionPercentAvg, maxSessionPercentMax, maxSessionPercentMin, maxWorkerPercentAvg, maxWorkerPercentMax, maxWorkerPercentMin, memoryUsagePercentAvg, memoryUsagePercentMax, memoryUsagePercentMin) select timeStamp, CPULimitAvg, CPUPercentAvg, CPUPercentMax, CPUPercentMin, dataIOPercentAvg, dataIOPercentMax, dataIOPercentMin, instanceCpuPercentAvg, instanceCpuPercentMax, instanceCpuPercentMin, instanceMemoryPercentAvg, instanceMemoryPercentMax, instanceMemoryPercentMin, logWritePercentAvg, logWritePercentMax, logWritePercentMin, maxSessionPercentAvg, maxSessionPercentMax, maxSessionPercentMin, maxWorkerPercentAvg, maxWorkerPercentMax, maxWorkerPercentMin, memoryUsagePercentAvg, memoryUsagePercentMax, memoryUsagePercentMin from archiveView where archiveView.lineNumber>1 //we skip the first line, because it can contain uncompleted period; notexists join archiveCheck where archiveCheck.timeStamp == archiveView.timestamp; }

Method.Name: cleanupOldData
insertMainTable
description
scheduleForBatchExecution
batchJobExists
canRunInNewSession
main
